infra_failed_rate_eq_0.basis: Final-code replay canonical normalized output classifies the corrupt unified diff as model-output invalid_submission, not infrastructure.

verifier_repair_after_live_eq_false.basis: No verifier or task-pack repair was made after the source live call; Revision 1 only replayed captured text through the final runner path.

unclassified_failure_rate_lte_20pct.basis: The replayed targeted failure has failure_class invalid_unified_diff and failure_owner model_output in normalized metadata.

all_runs_have_clean_patch_replay.basis: The final-code replay produced no verifier-ready patch; clean_patch_replay.attempted is false.

frontier_click_specialist_attempt1_compl.basis: The source frontier-click-specialist task-003 live call completed and consumed provider usage; the captured response was replayed without new spend through final code.

meaningful_film_contrast_exists.basis: Task 003 still separates patch/verifier failures from model-output contract failures; final-code replay adds direct invalid unified-diff evidence.

decision.stop_reason: Gate 1 remains clean-replay strict. The final repaired path emits invalid_unified_diff for the captured targeted response, but no verifier-ready patch exists, so clean replay does not pass.

notes: Do not reclassify invalid_submission as clean replay.
Do not run Click 004-008 on this evidence.
Revision 1 evidence is a no-new-spend replay of the source live response text; it is not a new live model attempt.
The stop is evidence-integrity based, not an API credential, quota, or repository-auth blocker.
